description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, industrial design with a predominantly metallic blue-green body accented by dark and copper-toned components. The main barrel is robust and cylindrical, extending forward with a black muzzle, while two parallel, ribbed structures run above the barrel, possibly serving as rails or additional barrels. Large, rounded side housings flank the central body, giving it a reinforced and high-tech appearance. The rear section is compact and squared, lacking a traditional stock, and the overall form is angular with visible mechanical details. The surface finish is mostly matte with some glossy highlights, and the object appears solid and heavy, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A futuristic, metallic blue-green shotgun with dual upper rails, rounded side housings, and a robust black barrel. The design is angular, compact, and industrial, lacking a traditional stock.
description_view_0: Front view shows the twin upper rails, central barrel, and rounded side housings, emphasizing the symmetrical and reinforced design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the barrel, the compact rear, and the prominent rounded housing, highlighting the shotgun's elongated profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the squared back, the two upper rails extending forward, and the symmetrical side housings, with the barrel receding from view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the barrel, side housing, and upper rails, with similar industrial detailing.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with two parallel upper rails or tubes, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
